creator: ale_sagra@hotmail.com
text:
Hello all,
I. am reaching out because I am the maintener of math/mcsim port: as you can read from the official website here [1], it seems development is blocked and there is a lot of uncertainty about the future of this software.

I wanted to understand what the port policy was in similar situations?

[1] https://www.gnu.org/software/mcsim/

Let me know if you have any doubts or questions,
Thank you
